title: Section 3A
content: 1 [3A. Free accommodation to spouse of Vice-President.– Subject to any rules that may be made in this behalf, the spouse of a person who dies– (a) while holding the office of Vice-President, or (b) after ceasing to hold office as Vice-President either by the expiration or his term of office or by resignation of his office, shall be entitled to the use of 2 [furnished residence (including its maintenance)] without payment of licence fee, for the remainder of her life.]
footnote: 1 Ins. by Act 23 of 2002, s. 3 (w.e.f.5-7-2002). 2 Subs. by Act 29 of 2008, s. 3, for "unfurnished residence" (w.e.f. 30-12-2008).
